Hjem - Brannvesenet Sør IKS

https://www.brannsor.no/
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 158
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="headline dib"> <a class="headlinelink" href="/ledig-stilling-som-brannkonstabel-deltid-i-kvinesdal.6739353-589848.html">Ledig stilling som brannkonstabel deltid i Kvinesdal</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Kontakt</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/BrannvesenetSor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/brannvesenetsor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-instagram"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/94e90897-3dca-41de-acef-049042496f45" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish AS</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput di" name="find" placeholder="Søk på siden ..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Brannsikkerhet - Brannvesenet Sør IKS

https://www.brannsor.no/brannsikkerhet.589882.no.html
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 146
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Kontakt</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/BrannvesenetSor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/brannvesenetsor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-instagram"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/94e90897-3dca-41de-acef-049042496f45" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish AS</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput di" name="find" placeholder="Søk på siden ..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (75 avvik)

Skjemaer - Brannvesenet Sør IKS

https://www.brannsor.no/skjemaer.589879.no.html
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 147
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Kontakt</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/BrannvesenetSor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/brannvesenetsor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-instagram"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/94e90897-3dca-41de-acef-049042496f45" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish AS</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput di" name="find" placeholder="Søk på siden ..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (75 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="close button large clear" data-close="">×</button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<input class="searchsubmit button" type="submit" value="Søk"/>

Konkurranse - Brannvesenet Sør IKS

https://www.brannsor.no/konkurranse.621216.no.html
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 141
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Kontakt</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/BrannvesenetSor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/brannvesenetsor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-instagram"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/94e90897-3dca-41de-acef-049042496f45" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish AS</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput di" name="find" placeholder="Søk på siden ..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (75 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Tjenester - Brannvesenet Sør IKS

https://www.brannsor.no/tjenester.590194.no.html
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 146
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Kontakt</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/BrannvesenetSor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/brannvesenetsor/" target="_blank"><i class="fi-social-instagram"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/94e90897-3dca-41de-acef-049042496f45" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish AS</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput di" name="find" placeholder="Søk på siden ..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (75 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="close button large clear" data-close="">×</button>

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Kontakt</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput di" name="find" placeholder="Søk på siden ..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
